name: uxu-code
description: Codex-native unified engineering workflows, minimal correct implementation, and concise technical output.

interface.shortDescription: Unified engineering workflows and release gates
interface.longDescription: Use Codex-native engineering workflows from specification through release with minimal correct implementations, concise evidence-backed output, and explicit safety gates.
defaultPrompt: Use the appropriate engineering workflow skills to implement this task.
